description: Angel Studios, Inc. operates as a media and technology company. The company produces and distributes films and series; and releases licensed films or shows. The company's platform allows users to watch movies, shows, and documentaries for all ages through its streaming platform. It also offers apparel, DVDs, Blu-rays, books; direct online store for Angel Studios themed products and wholesale products to retail partners; and content licensing services.
